_note: Income-band descriptors — the single home for every per-band property the model used to scatter across content.js (skill), roll.js (centralRank, range) and events.js (precarity ladder). Injected via makeRoller like all other data. centralRank/range are CALIBRATION OUTPUTS (they set where each band lands in national wealth rank and its hard floor/ceiling); treat them as sim-validated, not free knobs — npm run sim asserts class rises monotonically with band.

_schema.skill: cognitive-demand level used in IQ<->skill career selection
_schema.centralRank: central national wealth rank the band anchors to (0..1)
_schema.range: [floor, ceiling] hard bounds on reachable wealth rank, even with inheritance/luck
